mapper.select: select a.* from album a inner join album_artist aa on a.album_id = aa.album_id and aa.artist_id = #{artistId} order by a.release_date desc
select a.* from album a inner join album_artist aa on a.album_id = aa.album_id and aa.artist_id = #{artistId} order by a.release_date desc

select a.*, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT art.artist_id) AS artist_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT art.artist_name) AS artist_names from album a inner join album_artist aa on a.album_id = aa.album_id inner join artist art on aa.artist_id = art.artist_id where a.album_id = #{id} group by a.album_id
